articles.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Native Multimodal Reasoning and Extended Context
articles.summary: OpenAI officially released GPT-5, featuring deeply integrated multimodal reasoning across text, image, audio, and video inputs with a context window exceeding 1 million tokens. The model demonstrates significant improvements in long-horizon planning and mathematical proof generation, narrowing the gap with domain-specific formal verification tools. Enterprise API availability began rolling out this week with new structured-output guarantees.

articles.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini Robotics Models Enable Zero-Shot Manipulation in Unstructured Environments
articles.summary: DeepMind published results from its Gemini Robotics program showing that foundation models trained on massive simulation and real-world teleoperation data can perform zero-shot dexterous manipulation tasks in cluttered household environments. The system pairs a Gemini-class vision-language model with a diffusion-based action policy, achieving a 78% first-attempt success rate on previously unseen objects. The work signals a major step toward general-purpose robotic assistants.

articles.title: Anthropic Introduces Constitutional Oversight Layer for Autonomous AI Agent Deployments
articles.summary: Anthropic announced a new runtime safety framework called Constitutional Oversight that monitors and constrains autonomous AI agents acting in multi-step tool-use workflows. The system uses a lightweight supervisor model that evaluates each planned action against a configurable policy spec before execution, with formal guarantees on intervention latency. The release targets enterprise customers deploying agentic coding and data-analysis pipelines in production.

articles.title: Boston Dynamics and Hyundai Unveil Atlas Commercial Platform for Automotive Manufacturing
articles.summary: Boston Dynamics debuted the production version of its electric Atlas humanoid robot tailored for Hyundai's automotive assembly lines, capable of carrying 30 kg payloads and performing multi-step assembly sequences alongside human workers. The robot uses onboard LiDAR-vision fusion and a learned task planner that adapts to line configuration changes with minimal re-programming. Initial deployment covers three Hyundai plants in South Korea with expansion planned for late 2026.

articles.title: TSMC Begins Volume Production of 1.4nm-Class GAA Transistor Node for AI Accelerators
articles.summary: TSMC confirmed that its A14 process node, using next-generation gate-all-around nanosheet transistors, has entered volume production at its Kaohsiung fab primarily serving AI accelerator customers including NVIDIA and Broadcom. The node delivers approximately 25% higher transistor density and 20% power efficiency gains over N2, which is critical for scaling next-generation training clusters. Yield rates have reportedly reached production-viable thresholds ahead of the original Q3 timeline.

articles.title: Meta Open-Sources Llama 4 Behemoth 288B with Mixture-of-Experts Architecture
articles.summary: Meta released Llama 4 Behemoth, a 288B-active-parameter mixture-of-experts model with reportedly over 1.5 trillion total parameters, under a permissive open license. Benchmarks show it competing with GPT-5 on coding, reasoning, and multilingual tasks while being runnable on 4-node GPU clusters common in well-resourced startups. The release intensifies the open-weight vs. closed-model competitive dynamic and gives the open-source ecosystem its most capable foundation model to date.

articles.title: Breakthrough Solid-State Battery from QuantumScape Hits 1,000-Cycle Milestone in EV-Format Cells
articles.summary: QuantumScape reported that its multi-layer solid-state lithium-metal battery cells have surpassed 1,000 full charge-discharge cycles while retaining over 90% capacity in an automotive-format pouch configuration. The result addresses the key durability concern that has kept solid-state technology out of mass EV production. The company's partnership with Volkswagen's PowerCo targets initial vehicle integration in 2027 model-year programs.

articles.title: Figure AI Demonstrates Fully Autonomous Warehouse Order Fulfillment with Humanoid Robot Fleet
articles.summary: Figure AI showcased a fleet of its Figure 02 humanoid robots autonomously completing end-to-end warehouse order fulfillment tasks—including shelf navigation, item picking, packing, and handoff—at a BMW logistics facility without human teleoperation. The system coordinates multiple robots via a centralized task planner built on a fine-tuned vision-language model, achieving throughput competitive with traditional fixed automation. The demonstration marks one of the first commercially viable multi-robot humanoid deployments.
